findings.justification: The admin_init handler for download_product_csv verifies only a nonce (CSRF protection) but performs no current_user_can() capability check, so any authenticated user who can reach wp-admin and obtain the nonce can trigger a CSV product data download.

The $_GET['filename'] parameter is passed to set_filename() after only wp_unslash() with no path-component sanitization, potentially allowing directory traversal if the underlying exporter writes to a path derived from this value.
The $_POST['filename'] parameter is passed to set_filename() with only wp_unslash() and no sanitization of path separators, which could allow an authorized user to influence the output file path.
